mechanics.text:
SKILLS
Military This subskill represents the various fighting arts taught by organized militaries and police_ It borrows from many martial arts   styles and concentrates extreme offense and little finesse, with the goa of removing a opponent quickly by any means possible Haymaker (Attack): By taking Fatigue, you may add 206 damage. Sweep (Attack): Your target number to hit is increased by but if successful your opponent is knocked prone in addition taking normal damage _ Neck Jab (Attack): character must have at least Skill Bonus in Military t0 use this maneuver: Your target number is increased by the  target' s RFL Attribute plus his   highest Martial Arts Skill Bonus (if any) but your attack is successtul the target must make an immediate Knockout Test. This attack cannot be used against character in full-coverage armor
Navigation / Air This is the Srili of plotting ad following course through the atmosphere of planet; whether traveling VTOL_ stan- dard aircraft, an aerospace fighter or DropShip:
Navigation / Space This is the skill of plotting and tollowing course through interplanetary space whether traveling in an aerospace fighter; DropShip or WarShip
Navigation / Ground Also called orienteering this is the skill of plotting and fol: lowing course on the Iand surface of planet; whether travel- ing on foot Or in ground vehicle
Navigation/ Jump Drive This the skill of plotting course ior venicles that use the Kearny-Fuchida hyperspace jump drve It is rare and difficult-to Iearn skill that requires lengthy calculations and very accurate star maps This skill is only used t0 plot hyperspace jump points; use the Navigation / Space Subskill when moving jump capable vessels trom point to point in space using standard drives_
Tae Kwon Do This Martial Arts Subskill represents tae kwon do and other forms that focus on kicks such as savate and muay thai: It is most renowned for its emphasis power; practitioners can destroy wood planks and bricks with their bare hands and feet, not t0 mention what this does t0 their human opponents Block (Defense): Your opponent" : damage is divided in half (round down) but you cannot inflict damage this round Roundhouse Kick (Attack): character must have at least +2 Skill Bonus in Tae Kwon Do to use this maneuver: Costs Fatigue. You may add 306 damage and the attack has an Armor Penetration Value of Flying Klck (Attack): Costs Fatigue You can melee attack target up to two meters away: you win the round; the target must make Knockdown Test: In addition_ if the target was not in melee combat with you at the beginning of the round_ he may not inflict damage on you even if he wins this round of combat,
Navigation / Naval This is the skill of plotting ad following course through the waters Of planet; whether traveling in surface vessel Or submarine_
NEGOTIATION character with the Negotiation Skill is trained in the fine art of conversation and manipulation_ Negotiation Skill Check will affect the outcome of any negotiation which the charac ter takes part, successful roll will bring concessions but tailed roll could mean stalemate Or worse. Negotiation is also useful for interpreting veiled messages_ successful Action Check means the gamemaster can spell out in black and white what might otherwise be hidden in the evasive language diplo mat might use _ This skill is also useful for haggling: Make an Opposed Negotiation Skill Check against the target merchant: suc cessful roll allows the character to bargain merchant down_ For every point by which the MoS beats the merchant's MoS_ the seller will reduce his price by percent (to minimum of 25 percent of the original asking  price). If the character'$ MoS matches exactly, the merchant stands firm but might throw in Iittle  something extra the character fails the roll; the mer- chant holds fast. Either buy at his price Or go without: badly failed roii fumble might result in the merchant becoming insulted and either raising his price Or refusing to sell at alll
MEDTECH This skill represents wide range of medical knowledge_ Essentially, this skill covers all areas f advanced medicab care that Surgery does not, including extended care_ pharmacology; physical therapy and 50 on_ Rules on the use of this skill can be found in Healing (p 1231.
NAVIGATION" Simply put , Navigation the skill of   finding your way around. Characters with this skill are proficient in use of maps_ charts compasses and other instruments depending o the subskills known_ successful Skill Check required t0 make your way from point point through wilderness areas (if there are clearly marked roads and you have an accurate map this skill is not necessary). Also_ if the character is lost; Skill Check can be used to find his way t0 civilization_
PERCEPTION Simply put, this is the Skill of noticing things; using your senses to perceive the world around you and interpreting that information quickly and accurately: AlI characters have some level of Perception Skill, but only trained observers have high
